name: Satellogic Aleph API
description: Satellogic's Aleph API v2 provides comprehensive access to satellite imagery and geospatial intelligence capabilities. It supports ordering satellite imagery, searching archives via STAC-compliant endpoints, analyzing capture feasibility, tracking deliverables, and managing projects and user profiles.
